items.claim: Mike Davis has a history of fading or slowing down significantly in the later rounds of his fights.
items.quote: He was slowing down. I mean, in that second round, I don't want to say he was gassed, but it was kind of lucky there.

items.claim: Nuduralliev can out-wrestle Mike Davis over a 15-minute fight.
items.quote: I think he could probably out wrestle a guy like Mike Davis for 15 full minutes.

items.claim: Nuduralliev has better cardio and pace than Mike Davis.
items.quote: I feel like he's proven his pace in his last couple fights. He can hang more than a guy like Mike Davis can.

items.claim: Mike Davis lacks the full commitment and hunger for a championship run compared to Nuduralliev due to outside interests.
items.quote: I feel like he has more other avenues outside of the cage that he's kind of focused on as well along with his fighting career. And I feel like he's just not as like committed

items.claim: Cody Gibson has consistently struggled with grappling throughout his career.
items.quote: Cody Gibson, who has really struggled with the grappling throughout the years.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is taking this fight on short notice.
items.quote: He's taken it on short notice as well.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein has strong and tricky overall grappling skills.
items.quote: He's pretty tricky when it comes to the overall grappling though. And I think that's going to be his main path to victory
